description: Tracks Anvo nightly Apollo prospecting pipeline progress. Read this at the start of every run.

master_list.note: Index is approximate — use company names in stage2 files as the authoritative source.

stage2.note: Batch 15 Stage 2 COMPLETE: 25 REVEAL, 0 SKIP (all passed OPEN/location/identity checks in verification). Stage 3 processed all 25 on 2026-04-22: 19 REVEALED + 6 SKIPPED (5 NO_DECISION_MAKER Ricotta Heating/BBi/Phillips Southern/Accumax/Big Boy's Towing + 1 NO_EMAIL CW Electric owners both red-X).

pending_reveals.description: No pending reveals — batch15 fully processed on 2026-04-22.

stage4.scored_ranges: ranks 8-467 scored through 2026-04-14 gap fill. Ranks 443-467 (batches 14-15) added 2026-04-21/22 are NOT yet scored — 18 revealed contacts pending Stage 4 scoring.
stage4.remaining_to_score: Ranks 443-467 from batches 14-15 (18 newly revealed contacts) need Stage 4 scoring. Ranks 1-7 intentionally skipped per Edward.
stage4.note: Gap analysis completed 2026-04-14. 23 SKIPs include duplicates and companies too large for Anvo (JE Dunn $7.5B, PCI $2.1B, Jack Cooper $543M, etc).

stage5.reply_handling: Replies to anvoins.com should be forwarded to edward@anvo-insurance.com. Warm conversations continue from primary domain.
stage5.note: 61 Gmail drafts in edward@anvoins.com inbox. Domain switched from anvo-insurance.com to protect primary domain deliverability. Some duplicate drafts may exist from concurrent agent work — review before sending.

credit_cycle.note: Apollo UI source of truth — estimated; verify at next session start. 2026-04-22 session consumed ~22 credits (19 successful email reveals + ~3 variance from red-X unavailable clicks and stuck 'Saving results...' states). 9 days left in cycle, ~1785 credits remaining — need ~198 credits/day. Phone reveals (7-8 credits each) deferred to next session to preserve context.

phone_reveal_candidates_deferred.company: KA Pazdera Hauling and Excavating LLC
phone_reveal_candidates_deferred.title: Owner

run_order_for_next_session: 1. Read this state file and pipeline-learnings.json.
2. Verify Chrome connection and Apollo login + check actual credit balance vs estimate.
3. Disable Apollo enrichment mode at start (Step 0.5).
4. PRIORITY A: Stage 4 scoring for batch 14-15 newly revealed ranks 443-467 (18 contacts).
5. PRIORITY B: Phase 2 phone reveals — start with 13 deferred candidates in phone_reveal_candidates_deferred. Each = 7-8 credits.
6. PRIORITY C: Run Stage 2 batch 16 (25 companies from master list ~companies 476-500) if time permits.
7. PRIORITY D: Stage 3 reveals for batch 16.
8. Update this state file with new counts and credits.

9. KEY LEARNING 2026-04-21/22: Apollo 'Saving results...' stuck-state in table view still reveals the email successfully — use document.body.innerText global search for contact name, then regex extract email (no need to open profile page unless table is truly stale).
